steps.title: Map the passage's arc
steps.content: The text traces the Cafe from its 1973 origin in Medina's apartment, through its move to a cafe and then a permanent 1981 location, through its expansion into art and music, and closes with its ongoing role fostering emerging Nuyorican talent.

steps.title: Identify what kind of summary fits
steps.content: The passage covers both how the Cafe came to exist (founding) and what it does (mission), so the overall purpose is a broad overview of both.

steps.title: Eliminate by choice
steps.content:
• "To explain what motivated Medina to found the Nuyorican Poets Cafe": the text never gives Medina's motivation, only that he invited Nuyorican writers; this overreads. ✗
  • "To situate the Nuyorican Poets Cafe within the cultural life of New York as a whole": the text never compares the Cafe to broader NYC culture; this is out of scope. ✗
  • "To discuss why the Nuyorican Poets Cafe expanded its scope to include art and music": expansion is mentioned but no reason is given, and this misses the founding and mission content. ✗
  • "To provide an overview of the founding and mission of the Nuyorican Poets Cafe": matches the full arc from 1973 origin to present-day fostering of talent. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
